name: Heng Long Foreign Exchange
description_short: Currency exchange service in San Francisco's Financial District offering 40+ currencies with no fees and competitive daily rates, open 6 days weekly.
description_long:
Heng Long Foreign Exchange is a currency exchange service located at 627 Jackson Street in San Francisco, near the intersection of Jackson and Cooper Alley. The business operates in the Financial District with street meter parking available and serves customers seeking foreign currency for travel and international transactions.

The company specializes in buying and selling over 40 different currencies with a stated policy of charging no fees on exchanges. They advertise competitive rates and promote daily specials to attract customers. The business maintains extended hours during the week (10 AM–5:30 PM Monday through Saturday) and is closed on Sundays. Customers can call ahead at (415) 362-8718 to confirm currency availability and rates before visiting.

Heng Long distinguishes itself through its no-fee structure, multi-currency inventory, and convenience for travelers in a high-traffic area. The 4.5-star rating from 127 reviews (108 five-star, 10 four-star) reflects consistent positive customer feedback. Regular customers cite the service for trip preparation and currency conversion needs. The business emphasizes walk-in convenience and minimal wait times, with reviewers noting friendly counter service.

The main limitations are the Sunday closure and potential stock-outs of less common currencies without advance notice. One reviewer reported arriving without an appointment only to find their needed currency unavailable. The location's parking challenges (noted in reviews as "not easy") may deter some customers despite the proximity to public transit. The business's reliance on daily promotions suggests rates fluctuate and customers must check their website for best pricing.
pros: No fees on currency exchanges (stated policy)
Open 6 days per week with extended hours (10 AM–5:30 PM)
High customer satisfaction: 4.5 stars across 127 Yelp reviews
Walk-in service with minimal wait times reported
Located in accessible Financial District near public transit
Daily promotions and competitive rate pricing advertised
cons: Closed on Sundays, limiting weekend access
Currency availability not guaranteed without advance call confirmation
Street parking is difficult (noted in multiple reviews)
Rates require website/daily check for best promotions rather than fixed pricing
Small operation may have limited inventory of obscure currencies
best_for: Travelers preparing for international trips wanting common foreign currencies
San Francisco residents and visitors needing currency exchange near the Financial District
Customers seeking no-fee exchange services who can plan ahead
Business professionals and international students managing currency conversions
diagnosis: Heng Long Foreign Exchange is best suited for travelers and San Francisco residents needing convenient, fee-free currency exchange for common currencies before international travel. The main caveat is that specialty or less common currencies require advance phone confirmation, and the business closes on Sundays, making it less flexible for last-minute weekend needs.
